inputs.label: Trim Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Symmetric percentage of extreme values to exclude (0 ≤ trim < 50).

formulas.trimmedMean: (function(vals, pct) { var sorted = vals.filter(v => !isNaN(v)).sort((a,b)=>a-b); var n = sorted.length; var k = Math.floor(n * Math.min(50, Math.max(0, pct)) / 100); var trimmed = sorted.slice(k, n - k); var sum = trimmed.reduce((s,v) => s + v, 0); var count = trimmed.length; return count > 0 ? sum / count : 0; })([value1, value2, value3, value4, value5], trimPercent)
formulas.originalMean: (function(vals) { var arr = vals.filter(v => !isNaN(v)); var sum = arr.reduce((s,v) => s + v, 0); var n = arr.length; return n > 0 ? sum / n : 0; })([value1, value2, value3, value4, value5])
formulas.countUsed: (function(vals, pct) { var sorted = vals.filter(v => !isNaN(v)).sort((a,b)=>a-b); var n = sorted.length; var k = Math.floor(n * Math.min(50, Math.max(0, pct)) / 100); var trimmed = sorted.slice(k, n - k); return trimmed.length; })([value1, value2, value3, value4, value5], trimPercent)
